acceptance_rule: Timestamp must match exact chain + token + pair; never treat as token birth proof, deployer proof, or risk clearance.
purpose: Use exact chain/token/pair pair-created timestamp only as a bounded time-window hint.

acceptance_rule: No Base external fetch without separate approval and sanitized raw response.
purpose: Prepare Base contract creation source when key/indexer becomes available.

acceptance_rule: Provider no-record is not token failure; endpoint review is not evidence.
purpose: Review why getcontractcreation returned no record and whether another explorer-compatible source exists.

acceptance_rule: No eth_getLogs until a bounded block window exists.
purpose: Convert accepted timestamp hints into bounded block windows.
